2606.20520.title: Sovereign Execution Brokers: Enforcing Certificate-Bound Authority in Agentic Control Planes
2606.20520.paper_summary: Autonomous agents are increasingly connected to cloud, deployment, and data-control workflows, but production mutation authority should not reside inside non-deterministic reasoning processes. Existing access-control mechanisms authorize identities, while assurance layers certify proposed actions; neither alone provides a mandatory enforcement point for certified authority at the moment of mutation. This paper introduces the Sovereign Execution Broker (SEB), a runtime enforcement boundary for certificate-bound agentic infrastructure. SEB consumes certificates issued by the Sovereign Assurance Boundary (SAB), verifies that the requested mutation matches the certified execution contract, checks validity windows, policy epochs, revocation epochs, and live-state drift, mints scoped execution identity, invokes infrastructure APIs, and records signed decision and outcome records. By separating proposal, admission, and execution, SEB turns certified authority into a short-lived, revocable, auditable runtime capability, provided that production mutation APIs reject non-broker identities. We present the SEB execution model, certificate and replay-verification predicates, scoped identity semantics, bypass-prevention deployment patterns, failure behavior, and a concrete prototype implementation. We evaluate the prototype on AWS and Kubernetes clusters, measuring latency overheads, revocation propagation, drift detection, and security under fault injection.
2606.20520.paper_summary_zh: 自主代理越來越多地與雲端、部署和數據控制工作流程相連，但生產變更權限不應該存在於非確定性推理過程中。現有的訪問控制機制授權身份，而保證層則認證提議的行動；單獨的兩者都無法在變更的瞬間提供一個強制執行的認證權限點。本文介紹了主權執行代理（Sovereign Execution Broker，SEB），這是一個針對證書綁定的代理基礎設施的運行時執行邊界。SEB 消耗由主權保證邊界（Sovereign Assurance Boundary，SAB）發出的證書，驗證請求的變更是否符合認證的執行合約，檢查有效性窗口、政策週期、撤銷週期和實時狀態漂移，鑄造範圍執行身份，調用基礎設施 API，並記錄簽署的決策和結果記錄。通過分離提案、入場和執行，SEB 將認證權限轉化為一種短期的、可撤銷的、可審計的運行時能力，前提是生產變更 API 拒絕非代理身份。我們提出了 SEB 執行模型、證書和重放驗證謂詞、範圍身份語義、繞過預防部署模式、故障行為以及具體的原型實現。我們在 AWS 和 Kubernetes 集群上對原型進行評估，測量延遲開銷、撤銷傳播、漂移檢測和故障注入下的安全性。
2606.20520.author: Jun He et.al.
